title: Glacier Sensor Net: Maximal D-Optimal Polarity Design
strategies: trivial reference: diagonal +1 / off-diagonal -1 design (2I - J), the checker's baseline
seeded multi-restart random +/-1 matrices, keep the largest exact |det|
Sylvester-Hadamard submatrix selection (odd N has no Hadamard, so delete rows/cols from a 2^k Hadamard) with a light single-entry-flip hill-climb
structured circulant / near-conference-matrix constructions for odd orders (D-optimal designs)
